commands.name: describe
commands.description: Provides description of an individual test

arguments.name: THE NAME OF THE TEST TO DESCRIBE

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates an example test definitions file for editing

options.name: --output
options.description:
<TEXT>  []
Path to where to output an example test definitions file

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all tests that will be executed

commands.name: verify
commands.description:
Performs test verifications against a couchbase server node
Use "CouchbaseVerifier.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.

options.name: --host
options.description:
<TEXT>
Couchbase Host to attempt connections to

options.name: --username
options.description:
<TEXT>
Username to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

options.name: --password
options.description:
<TEXT>
Password to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

options.name: --definitions
options.description:
<TEXT>
Path to a json file containing Test Definitions

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
<NUMBER>  [60]
How long to wait for a response from Couchbase Server

options.name: --retries
options.description:
<NUMBER>  [5]
The amount of times data will be attempted to be retrieved and validated against test definitions
